subject: Build compare, news, and legal pages
description: Phase 3.5+3.6+3.7: Build compare page (src/pages/compare.astro) with product selector (search + select up to 4), CompareTable with winner highlighting, auto-generated summary, URL state. Build news page (src/pages/news.astro) with NewsCard grid and source filtering. Migrate legal/info pages (about, contact, privacy, terms, disclosure) to Astro layouts.
